item.title: Popgear Marvel Avengers Assemble Captain America Distressed Shield Boys T-Shirt Camisetas de Moda Navy 5-6 Years para Niños
item.description: Tienes Popgear Marvel Avengers Assemble Captain America Distressed Shield Boys T-Shirt Camisetas de Moda Navy 5-6 Years para Niños aqui! 🔎: Material: 100% algodón Cierre: Pull-On Color: azul marino Camiseta de cuello redondo de ajuste regular con mangas cortas Instrucciones de cuidado: lavar a máquina 🛒 Comprar!!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
